mapper.select: SELECT id, blood_pressure_high bloodPressureHigh, blood_pressure_low bloodPressureLow, blood_glucose_high bloodGlucoseHigh, blood_glucose_low bloodGlucoseLow, heart_rate_low heartRatelow, heart_rate_high heartRatehigh, spo2, temperature_high temperatureHigh, temperature_low temperatureLow, weight, update_date updateDate FROM t_health_data_threshold where id = 1
mapper.update: update t_health_data_threshold set blood_pressure_high = #{bloodPressureHigh}, blood_pressure_low = #{bloodPressureLow}, blood_glucose_high = #{bloodGlucoseHigh}, blood_glucose_low = #{bloodGlucoseLow}, heart_rate_low = #{heartRatelow}, heart_rate_high = #{heartRatehigh}, spo2 = #{spo2}, temperature_high = #{temperatureHigh}, temperature_low = #{temperatureLow}, weight = #{weight}, update_date = now() where id = 1
